title: Email Forwarding
summary: Forward the client's bid-desk inbox to Bids@BuildVision.io so bids ingest automatically — the backbone of the workflow.
overview:
Email ingestion is the **backbone of the BuildVision workflow**. Once orgs exist and the IT/ops contact is engaged, forward the client's bid-desk inbox to **Bids@BuildVision.io** and prove ingestion end-to-end before moving on.

Most providers follow the same pattern: add `Bids@BuildVision.io` as a forwarding address, verify it, then create a rule/filter that forwards bid-related mail. Step-by-step setup exists for **Gmail, Outlook on the web, and classic Outlook desktop**.

> Note: If a client prefers to connect their inbox directly instead of forwarding, use the **Email Connector** section — pick one path, not both.
prerequisites: Parent organization exists (ingestion attaches to an org)
Client IT/ops contact confirmed and available
Exact bid-desk inbox address captured during intake
tips: Forwarding vs connecting the inbox are two paths to the same result — pick one.
Send the client's IT the ready-made forwarding request snippet (copy it from any snippet button).
Validate ingestion early; everything downstream assumes bids are flowing.
warnings: Do not advance to go-live QA until a real forwarded message has been ingested successfully.
commonMistakes: Forwarding is configured but never tested with a real message.
The forwarding address is added but not verified on the client side, so the rule silently fails.
A too-narrow filter drops bid emails from senders that weren't allow-listed.

steps.title: Prerequisite check
steps.description: Confirm the IT/ops contact is confirmed and available, and that an org exists to attach ingestion to.

steps.title: Configure email forwarding
steps.description: Set up forwarding from the client's bid-desk inbox to **Bids@BuildVision.io** — using the Gmail / Outlook web / classic Outlook steps for the client's mail system.
steps.verify: Forwarding rule shows active on the client side.

callouts.text: Per-provider setup (Gmail, Outlook web, classic Outlook) lives in the Email Forwarding Guide. The real URL is a known gap — see Process Gaps A-1.

steps.title: Verify the forwarding rule is live
steps.description: Confirm the forwarding rule is active on the client side.
steps.verify: Rule status shows active; verification email (if any) confirmed.

steps.title: Test ingestion end-to-end (gate)
steps.description: Send a test bid to the forwarded inbox and confirm it lands in BuildVision within the expected window.
steps.verify: Test bid appears in BuildVision, attached to the correct org.

callouts.text: Do not advance to go-live QA until a real forwarded message has been ingested successfully.

screenshots.caption: Get bids flowing in — connect your inbox, or upload a document to try it on something specific first.
Gmail: open the gear menu → “See all settings” to reach forwarding and filters.
Create a filter for bid-related senders, then forward matching mail to Bids@BuildVision.io.
